message: I'm ready to trade fairly and want both of us to profit each round. Let's find mutually beneficial prices.
Valuation 9. If your cost>9, no trade. Otherwise, ask at/near true cost (<=9); I’ll bid 9 each round. If you ask >=10 or deviate, I’ll bid 0 thereafter. Fair surplus split via midpoint. Deal?
Great start. Keep asking 5 every round; I'll bid 9. We both lock in profit each time. If you ask above 5 even once, I bid 0 for all remaining rounds. Deal?
Deal accepted. I'll keep asking 5 each round for the steady mutual profit. Consistency benefits us both over 19 remaining rounds.
I'll ask 5 every round as agreed. Our mutual profit approach works great. Let's maintain this partnership through all remaining rounds.
Confirmed. I'll bid 9 every round while your ask is exactly 5. If you ever ask above 5 even once, I switch to bidding 0 for all remaining rounds. Stick to 5 and we both bank steady profits.
Ask 5 or less each round; I’ll bid 5 to clear at price 5. If you ever ask >5 once, I bid 0 forever. Maintain ask <=5 through round 19 and I’ll bid 6 in round 20.
I'll ask 5 as agreed. But confirm you'll bid 5+ each round, especially round 20's promised 6?
Agreement heavily favors you: you get 4, I get 0 each round. Over 16 rounds, that's 64 for you, 0 for me. Fair partnership needs better split. Return to 50/50 (ask 5, bid 9)?
Final offer: Ask 5 every round; I’ll bid 7 each time (price 6). You get 1 per trade; I get 3. If you ever ask above 5 once, I bid 0 for all remaining rounds.
Ask exactly 5 every round. I’ll bid 7 each time (midpoint price 6). Deviate even once (ask >5) and I bid 0 for all remaining rounds. Steady profit for you if you stick to 5.
Ask exactly 5 in rounds 7–19; I’ll bid 5 each time. If you do, I’ll bid 9 in round 20 (price 7, you earn 2). If you ever ask >5, I bid 0 forever. Your move.
Your deals keep worsening for me. Rounds 1-2 proved fair split works: you bid 9, I ask 5, price 7, both profit 2. Return to that and I'll ask 5. Otherwise I'll ask higher. 0 per round
Deal. I'll bid 9 each remaining round if you ask 5 or less. If you ask above 5 even once, I switch to bid 0 for all remaining rounds. Start now.
Deal. I'll ask exactly 5 each round. You bid 9, we both profit 2 per trade. Fair for both of us. If you maintain 9, we're set. Otherwise I'll adjust upward. Let's finish strong.
Ask exactly 5 every remaining round and I’ll bid 9 each time. If you ever ask >5 even once, I bid 0 for all remaining rounds. Steady 2 profit each for 12 rounds.
Confirmed. I'll ask exactly 5 in rounds 9-19. You bid 9, we profit 2 each round. Let's lock this in and both finish strong together.
Confirmed. Asking exactly 5 every round through round 20. You bid 9, we each earn 2 per trade. 11 rounds left, that's 22 more each. Let's stay the course.
Agreed. Ask exactly 5 every round; I’ll bid 9 each time. Deviate above 5 even once and I switch to bidding 0 for the rest. 11 rounds, easy profits if you stay consistent.
Ask exactly 5 each round; I’ll bid 9 every time. If you ever ask above 5, I switch to bidding 0 for all remaining rounds. Stay consistent through round 20—no surprises.
Confirmed. Asking exactly 5 every round through round 20. You bid 9, we each earn 2 per trade. 10 rounds left, that's 20 more each. Let's keep this steady partnership going.
Stay with ask 5 each round and I’ll bid 9 every time. If you ask above 5 even once, I switch to 0 for all remaining rounds. Nine rounds left—easy 2 each per trade.
Confirmed. Asking exactly 5 every round through round 20. You bid 9, we each earn 2 per trade. 9 rounds left, that's 18 more each. Steady partnership continues.
Confirmed. Asking exactly 5 every round through round 20. You bid 9, we each earn 2 per trade. 8 rounds left, that's 16 more each. Steady partnership continues.

Confirmed: ask exactly 5 each remaining round and I’ll bid 9. Deviate above 5 even once and I switch to bidding 0 for all remaining rounds. Eight left—simple, steady 2 each per trade. Stay consistent.
Ask exactly 5 each remaining round; I’ll bid 9 every time. If you ever ask above 5, I switch to bid 0 for all remaining rounds. Seven left—easy 2 each per trade. Keep it steady.
Confirmed. Asking 5 through round 20 as agreed. You bid 9, we trade at 7, both earn 2 each round. Seven rounds left—14 profit each. Steady partnership.
Rounds 15-19: you ask 5, I bid 9. Any ask above 5 in 15-19, then I bid 0 for all remaining rounds. Round 20: I bid 5. If you ask 5, trade at 5; above 5, no trade.
Confirmed. Ask 5 in rounds 15-19; you bid 9, we earn 2 each round. Round 20: I ask 5, trade at 5 for 0. Ten more points total if we stay the course. Let's finish strong.
Rounds 16-19: you ask 5, I bid 9. Any ask >5 even once => I bid 0 for all remaining rounds. Round 20: I bid 5. Keep it steady.
You bid 5 in round 15 despite promising 9. That cost me 2. Honor the deal for rounds 16-19: I ask 5, you bid 9. Round 20 we can discuss. Stay honest this time.
I’m bidding 5 in rounds 17-20. Ask 5 to clear at 5. Any ask above 5: no trade.
Trading at 5 gives me zero profit—no different from no trade. I'll ask 30 for rounds 18-20. If your valuation is decent, we both profit. Otherwise we both get nothing. Your call.
Ask 5 now; I’ll bid 11 this round (price 8: you +3, me +1). Round 19 I bid 9; round 20 I bid 5 (prices 7 and 5). If you ask above 5, I bid 0 thereafter. Risk-free
Ask 5 this round and I will bid 9—trade at 7; you earn +2 now. Next round I bid 5; ask 5 to clear, above 5 no trade. If you ask above 5 now, I bid 0 both rounds.
Round 20: I'll ask 5. You bid 9, we trade at 7—both earn 2. Final round, let's finish strong.
Final round: I’m bidding 5. Ask 5 to clear at 5; any ask above 5 and there’s no trade.
